footer.text: Character Guide • Build: Varka | Update Date: 02/27/2026 | Editor: ._.samantha._.

fields.name: Best Weapon(s):
fields.value:
__Gest of the Mighty Wolf__
BiS weapon, with a large gap from the next strongest alternative. Provides everything he needs.

__Tidal Shadow__
Free craftable 4-star from Fontaine. Most of his best teams have a healer to trigger the passive with ease.

fields.name: Replacement Weapon(s):
fields.value:
__Beacon of the Reed Sea, Redhorn Stonethresher, Wolf's Gravestone, Verdict, Fang of the Mountain King__
5-star alternatives that will act as statsticks

__Serpent Spine__
BiS 4-star option if all 5 stacks are up, becoming better than the 5-star alternatives at R5.

fields.name: Main Stats Priority
fields.value: <sands> ATK%|<goblet> Elemental DMG Bonus% or ATK% or Anemo DMG Bonus%|<circlet> CRIT DMG or CRIT Rate

fields.name: Talent Priority
fields.value:
**1)** Elemental Skill: Windbound Execution
**N/A)** Elemental Burst: Northwind Avatar
**N/A)** Normal Attack: Favonius Bladework: Dancing Radiance

fields.name: Notes:
fields.value: __Gladiator's Finale__ is another general option that most players will have. __Nymph's Dream__, __Heart of Depth__, in Hydro teams, __Lavawalker__ or __Viridescent Venerer__ in Pyro teams, __Blizzard Strayer__ in Cryo teams, __Thundersoother__ in Electro Teams and __Marechaussee Hunter__ in Furina teams are also viable. Otherwise, 2-piece mixed sets can be used.
